What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

[Verse 1]
There I was again tonight
Forcing laughter, faking smiles
Same old tired, lonely place
Walls of insincerity
Shifting eyes and vacancy
Vanished when I saw your face
All I can say is it was enchanting to meet you

[Verse 2]
Your eyes whispered, "Have we met?"
Across the room, your silhouette
Starts to make its way to me
The playful conversation starts
Counter all your quick remarks
Like passing notes in secrecy
And it was enchanting to meet you
All I can say is I was enchanted to meet you

[Chorus]
This night is sparklin', don't you let it go
I'm wonderstruck, blushin' all the way home
I'll spend forever wonderin' if you knew
I was enchanted to meet you

[Verse 3]
The lingering question kept me up
2 a.m., who do you love?
I wonder 'til I'm wide awake
And now, I'm pacing back and forth
Wishing you were at my door
I'd open up and you would say
"Hey, it was enchanting to meet you"

I was enchanted to meet you

This was the very first page
Not where the storyline ends

Until I see you again

Autumn nights, I confine
Myself in galleries of us, just because I miss you

That demand our distance

And I'll be right here, in case you need to talk

Why can't we be together, baby?
Why does it take so long?
Why can't we be together, baby?
Should we keep holding on
Even when hope seems gone?

I long for you in the quiet after midnight
In my room
Movies of us, they replay inside my head
Over and over again

Just when healing could happen
I keep peeling the wounds open
To live in a world without you
Is to live in a world without meaning

Why can't we be together, baby?
Why does it take so long? (take so long)
Why can't we be together, baby?
Should we keep holding on
Even when hope seems gone?

In the morning light, when the pain subsides
I’ll face this truth with my own two eyes
From the fallen trees of your aftermath
I’ll find my peace, i will find my path

I will find my path

Autumn nights
Why does it take so long?
Autumn nights
Should we keep holding on and on and on

Why can't we be together, baby?
Why does it take so long?
Why can't we be together, baby?
Should we keep holding on
Even when hope seems gone?
Guess we’ll keep hoping on ahhh

This is a video on the Unstable Universe: a staged Minecraft server where Spoke, Wemmbu, FlameFrags, and ParrotX2 aim to tell the best stories possible. btw a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft.

snippet.title: OCEAN DEEP - Cliff Richard (Lyrics Video)
snippet.description:
OCEAN DEEP - Cliff Richard (Lyrics Video)
Let yourself drift into the gentle waves of emotion with *“Ocean Deep”* by **Cliff Richard** — a timeless ballad that captures the quiet intensity of love, longing, and heartfelt devotion. With its soothing melody and deeply expressive lyrics, this song feels like standing alone by the sea, where every wave carries a memory.
In this lyrics video, you can follow every word as the music flows softly like calm ocean tides — perfect for relaxing, reflecting, or simply getting lost in the beauty of classic love songs.
✨ **What makes this song special?**
* Emotional and heartfelt vocals
* A peaceful, slow rhythm that calms the mind
* Lyrics that speak of deep, unwavering love
🎧 Whether you're unwinding after a long day, enjoying a quiet night, or reminiscing about someone special, *Ocean Deep* is the perfect companion.
💬 Don’t forget to like, comment, and subscribe for more timeless music and relaxing lyric videos!
🔔 Turn on notifications so you never miss a new upload.
